/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/controller.dir/main.cpp.o -o controller   -L/usr/local/tensorrt/targets/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/tensorrt/targets/x86_64-linux-gnu/lib:/usr/local/zed/lib: ../lib/robot/librobot.a ../lib/parser/libparser.a options/libcontroller_options.a player/libplayer.a -lboost_program_options player/skill/libskill.a player/fsm/libfsm.a player/core/libcore.a player/engine/action/libaction.a player/engine/walk/libwalk.a player/engine/scan/libscan.a player/engine/led/libled.a player/vision/libvision.a ../lib/imageproc/libimageproc.a /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lpthread player/localization/libSL.a -lrt -lstdc++ -lcudart player/sensor/libsensor.a player/server/libserver.a /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0 -lMVSDK -lboost_system drivers/dynamixel/libdynamixel.a drivers/gpio/libgpio.a /usr/local/zed/lib/libsl_zed.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
